# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

This repository contains the source of a personal portfolio website built with
Eleventy and deployed to GitHub Pages. Only the latest version on the `main`
branch (and the site deployed from it at <https://astromyth101.github.io>) is
supported.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please **do not open a public issue** for security problems.

Instead, report it privately via GitHub's vulnerability reporting:

1. Go to the [Security tab](https://github.com/AstroMyth101/AstroMyth101.github.io/security)
2. Click **Report a vulnerability** and fill in the advisory form

Or use this direct link:
<https://github.com/AstroMyth101/AstroMyth101.github.io/security/advisories/new>

When reporting, please include:

- A description of the issue and where it occurs (file, page, or workflow)
- Steps to reproduce it
- Any impact you believe it has

## Scope

Reports are welcome for anything in this repository, for example:

- The deployed static site (e.g. injected or unsafe content)
- The build pipeline and GitHub Actions workflows
- Dependency vulnerabilities that affect the built site

This is a personal project maintained on a best-effort basis; reports are
usually acknowledged within a few days.
